Fact.Name: QBI — business i
Fact.Description: Form 8995 line 1i(c). Qualified business income or (loss) for business i.

Fact.Name: QBI — business ii
Fact.Description: Form 8995 line 1ii(c). Qualified business income or (loss) for business ii.

Fact.Name: QBI — business iii
Fact.Description: Form 8995 line 1iii(c). Qualified business income or (loss) for business iii.

Fact.Name: QBI — business iv
Fact.Description: Form 8995 line 1iv(c). Qualified business income or (loss) for business iv.

Fact.Name: QBI — business v
Fact.Description: Form 8995 line 1v(c). Qualified business income or (loss) for business v.

Fact.Name: Total qualified business income
Fact.Description: Form 8995 line 2. Combine lines 1i through 1v, column (c).

Fact.Name: QBI loss carryforward
Fact.Description: Form 8995 line 3. Qualified business net (loss) carryforward from the prior year.

Fact.Name: Total qualified business income
Fact.Description: Form 8995 line 4. Combine lines 2 and 3. If zero or less, enter -0-.

Fact.Name: QBI component
Fact.Description: Form 8995 line 5. Qualified business income component. Multiply line 4 by 20%.

Fact.Name: REIT and PTP income
Fact.Description: Form 8995 line 6. Qualified REIT dividends and publicly traded partnership (PTP) income or (loss).

Fact.Name: REIT/PTP loss carryforward
Fact.Description: Form 8995 line 7. Qualified REIT dividends and qualified PTP (loss) carryforward from the prior year.

Fact.Name: Total REIT and PTP income
Fact.Description: Form 8995 line 8. Combine lines 6 and 7. If zero or less, enter -0-.

Fact.Name: REIT and PTP component
Fact.Description: Form 8995 line 9. REIT and PTP component. Multiply line 8 by 20%.

Fact.Name: QBI deduction before income limitation
Fact.Description: Form 8995 line 10. Add lines 5 and 9.

Fact.Name: Taxable income before QBI deduction
Fact.Description: Form 8995 line 11. Form 1040 line 11a minus lines 12e and 13b.

Fact.Name: Net capital gain plus qualified dividends
Fact.Description: Form 8995 line 12. Net capital gain, if any, plus qualified dividends.

Fact.Name: Income minus capital gains
Fact.Description: Form 8995 line 13. Subtract line 12 from line 11. If zero or less, enter -0-.

Fact.Name: Income limitation
Fact.Description: Form 8995 line 14. Multiply line 13 by 20%.

Fact.Name: Qualified business income deduction
Fact.Description: Form 8995 line 15. Enter the smaller of line 10 or line 14.

Fact.Name: QBI loss carryforward
Fact.Description: Form 8995 line 16. Total qualified business (loss) carryforward. Combine lines 2 and 3. If greater than zero, enter -0-.

Fact.Name: REIT/PTP loss carryforward
Fact.Description: Form 8995 line 17. Total qualified REIT dividends and PTP (loss) carryforward. Combine lines 6 and 7. If greater than zero, enter -0-.
